phrases.intent_en: Which path leads to Hot Spring Colonnade?
phrases.text_local: Která cesta vede k Vřídelní kolonádě?
phrases.cultural_note: The path along the Teplá River is a scenic route connecting the park to the spa zone.

likely_response.local: Vpravo podél řeky, po schodech nahoru.
likely_response.translation_en: Right along the river, then up the stairs.

responses.english: Right along the river, then up the stairs.
responses.local: Vpravo podél řeky, po schodech nahoru.

phrases.cultural_note: The Bedřich Smetana monument is a central feature of the park named after him.

likely_response.translation_en: In the middle of the park, behind the flower beds.

responses.english: In the middle of the park, behind the flower beds.

phrases.cultural_note: Donation boxes for park maintenance are often placed near main entrances or prominent features.

likely_response.translation_en: By the main entrance next to the bench.

responses.english: By the main entrance next to the bench.

phrases.cultural_note: Several cafés line the edge of the park along the main promenade.

likely_response.local: Na konci promenády, hned u východu.
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the promenade, right by the exit.

responses.english: At the end of the promenade, right by the exit.
responses.local: Na konci promenády, hned u východu.
